commands.repair_reason: Contributor revision and maintainer/security review are needed because this external PR lacks real behavior proof, is conflicting with the current doctor-health flow, and changes CODEOWNERS-protected SecretRef behavior.; Needs attention: The diff changes exported SecretRef strict-helper semantics through process-wide doctor leniency.; Review finding: [P2] Rebase SecretRef tolerance onto doctor health flow — src/comm... (sha=8c2069be8e23171887e22376a5ceb84446812559)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes doctor gateway cleanup hints to render from detected extra services, downgrades unresolved exec SecretRefs during doctor to warnings, and updates generated plugin SDK API baselines.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main can report a custom LaunchAgent that runs openclaw gateway as an extra service, and current doctor/status callers then render cleanup hints without passing that detected service context; I did not run tests because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor revision and maintainer/security review are needed because this external PR lacks real behavior proof, is conflicting with the current doctor-health flow, and changes CODEOWNERS-protected SecretRef behavior.

target.title: fix(doctor): skip cleanup hints for active gateway and downgrade exec SecretRef errors to warnings
target.author: daniel-knox

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
